## BottomlessWater 3.4.5

Standardization release — no code, config, or hook changes.

### Changed
- Adopted the shared [DunganSoft Plugin Standard](https://github.com/gjdunga/rust-plugin-standard).
  `manifest.json` and `.umod.yaml` now use the canonical schema (`author_handle`,
  `tags`, structured `links`); `License.md` renamed to `LICENSE`; added `SECURITY.md`
  and a sample `oxide/config/BottomlessWater.json`; vendored the conformance checker
  (`tools/check-standard.py`) and a `standards.yml` CI gate that keeps the repo
  conformant on every push and PR.

### Install / update
Drop `BottomlessWater.cs` into `oxide/plugins/` and run `oxide.reload BottomlessWater`.
See `INSTALL.md`.
